name: IG Group Holdings plc
description: IG Group Holdings plc is a global fintech company that provides online trading platforms and financial services. Founded in 1974, the company offers contracts for difference (CFDs), financial spread betting, and stockbroking services to retail and professional clients worldwide. IG Group enables trading on a wide range of financial markets, including forex, indices, shares, commodities, and cryptocurrencies, through its advanced technology and platforms.
